examples: However, biopsy findings were compatible with gluten-sensitive enteropathy in all seven patients.
Removing foods containing these grains from the diet will cause this gluten-sensitive enteropathy to subside.
This group of patients has remarkable predisposition to autoimmunity and the diagnosis of autoimmune enteropathy should be considered in such cases.
Celiac disease is also called gluten-sensitive enteropathy and nontropical sprue.
